description: Local fallback knowledge base used when external providers are unavailable.

entries.title: Mental health safety boundary
entries.text: HoldOff is a support tool and companion. It is not therapy, not diagnosis, and not a substitute for professional care.

entries.title: HoldOff mission
entries.text: HoldOff helps users pause before sending emotionally charged texts and return to a grounded response.

entries.title: The Pause
entries.text: Core product behavior is creating a pause between impulse and send so users can avoid escalation.

entries.title: Sadie companion framing
entries.text: Sadie offers empathic companionship and pattern reflection while staying within non-diagnostic boundaries.

entries.title: Degraded mode expectation
entries.text: Public pages should remain available in degraded mode while dependency-backed actions fail safely with explicit, non-crashing errors.
